content.title: Single Person Discount
content.summary: If you are the only adult resident at your address, you may qualify for a 25% discount.

body_sections.heading: Who can apply
body_sections.html: You can apply if you are the only adult resident at your address.

body_sections.heading: How to apply
body_sections.html:
Complete the online form and upload supporting evidence.

  • Proof of residence
  • Council Tax account number

body_sections.heading: When to notify us
body_sections.html: You must tell us about changes in circumstances within 21 days.
